name: Narendra Modi
text: Narendra Modi, BJP MP from Varanasi, Prime Minister of India. Won Varanasi seat in 2014, 2019, and 2024 Lok Sabha elections.

name: Rahul Gandhi
text: Rahul Gandhi, Congress MP from Rae Bareli, Leader of Opposition in 18th Lok Sabha. Previously represented Amethi (2004-2019). Won Rae Bareli and Wayanad in 2024.

name: Amit Shah
text: Amit Shah, BJP MP from Gandhinagar, Union Home Minister and Minister of Cooperation.

name: Rajnath Singh
text: Rajnath Singh, BJP MP from Lucknow, Union Defence Minister.

name: Nitin Gadkari
text: Nitin Gadkari, BJP MP from Nagpur, former Union Minister of Road Transport and Highways. Known for massive highway construction push across India.

name: Smriti Irani
text: Smriti Zubin Irani, BJP Rajya Sabha MP. Former Union Minister of Women and Child Development. She previously defeated Rahul Gandhi in Amethi in 2019.

name: Anurag Thakur
text: Anurag Singh Thakur, BJP MP from Hamirpur. Former Union Minister of Information and Broadcasting and Youth Affairs.

name: Shashi Tharoor
text: Shashi Tharoor, Congress MP from Thiruvananthapuram. Diplomat, author, and former UN Under-Secretary-General. Known for his oratory and English vocabulary.

name: Mahua Moitra
text: Mahua Moitra, TMC leader. Former MP from Krishnanagar. Known for fiery speeches in Parliament. Was expelled from Lok Sabha in 2023 over ethics committee findings.

name: Asaduddin Owaisi
text: Asaduddin Owaisi, AIMIM MP from Hyderabad. Four-term MP and prominent voice for minority rights. Barrister by profession.

name: Supriya Sule
text: Supriya Sule, NCP (Sharad Pawar) MP from Baramati, daughter of Sharad Pawar. Prominent woman leader in Maharashtra politics.

name: Jaya Bachchan
text: Jaya Bachchan, SP Rajya Sabha MP. Veteran actress and politician. Known for raising cultural and film industry issues in Parliament.

name: Hema Malini
text: Hema Malini, BJP MP from Mathura. Veteran actress and MP since 2014. Has won Mathura seat twice.

name: Dimple Yadav
text: Dimple Yadav, SP MP from Mainpuri. Wife of Akhilesh Yadav. Won Mainpuri in 2022 by-election and 2024 general election.

name: Priyanka Gandhi Vadra
text: Priyanka Gandhi Vadra, Congress MP from Wayanad. She won the 2024 Wayanad by-election after Rahul Gandhi vacated the seat. She is Congress General Secretary and sister of Rahul Gandhi.

name: Dharmendra Pradhan
text: Dharmendra Pradhan, BJP Rajya Sabha MP and Union Minister of Education. Previously served as Petroleum Minister. Key architect of National Education Policy 2020.

name: Piyush Goyal
text: Piyush Goyal, BJP RS MP and Union Minister of Commerce and Industry. Former Railway Minister and Energy Minister. Known for 100% railway electrification push.

name: Nusrat Jahan
text: Nusrat Jahan Ruhi Jain, TMC leader and actress. Former MP from Basirhat. One of the youngest and most glamorous MPs to enter Parliament.

name: Kangana Ranaut
text: Kangana Ranaut, BJP MP from Mandi, Himachal Pradesh. Bollywood actress who entered politics in 2024 and won the Mandi Lok Sabha seat.

name: Pappu Yadav
text: Rajesh Ranjan alias Pappu Yadav, Congress MP from Purnia, Bihar. Controversial strongman politician. Won the 2024 election on Congress ticket.
